docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CITY SHOWBOAT, INC. T/A THE ATLANTIC CITY SHOWBOAT HOTEL AND CASINO AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, SHENG G. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO SHENG G. ZHANG ON MAR-17-2005 OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCES, NO PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED.
